upasargachandrika.example_text: 'rAtriH kasmAt praramayati BUtAni naktaYcarARi' (ni॰2.18.2) prakarzeRa ramayati=vinodayati=pramodayati
'tato'grahAraharaRAdeva pravirato'Bavad' (rAjata॰4.638) pravirataH=virataH=uparataH viSabdo DAtvarTaM viparItayati ramiScezwAmAha viramistu cezwAvirAmam
(iriRam) aparatA asmAdozaDaya iti vA' (ni॰6.8.1) aparatAH=apagatAH avasTAnamakurvARAH

'prekzyAdrisAnvaparatAnyasamastasattvam' (BA॰pu॰10.21.10) aparatam= niScezwam=karmAntaraviratam apaSabdo verarTe lOkike sAhitye'papUrvasya ramerlaBaH prayogo'nyatra SrImadBAgavatAt tatra cCando'nukaraRaM bahulam
'Baktasya tatra samaramanta mamApi vAcaH' (mahAvIra॰1.7) samaramanta=nandimApnuvan
'saMraMsIzWAH suramunigate vartmani prAjyaDarme' (Bawwi॰19.30) ukto'rTaH
'pAvakaSca tadA dAvaM dagDvA samfgapakziRam ahAni paYca cEkaM ca virarAma sutarpitaH' (BA0 Adi0 23415).. virarAma upArarAma dahanakarmaRo nivavfte
'viramet pakziRIM rAtrim' (manu0 497) aDyayanAditi SezaH aDyayanavirAmaM kuryAdityarTaH
'prAraBya viGnavihatA viramanti maDyAH' (Bartf0 nIti0 ) viramanti kAryavicCedaM kurvantItyAha
'na sTirakarmA virarAma karmaRaH' (raGu0 822) karmaprabanDo'syApratibadDo baBUvetyarTaH
'aviditagatayAmA rAtrireva vyaraMsIt' (uttara0 127) rAtriravasAnamayAsIt
'hA hanta rajanIM tadAnIM kaTAprakArErbahuBirmahAtmA virAmayAmAsa narendrasUnuH' (rA0 76617) avasAnaM ninAya gamayAmAsetyarTaH
'kimiti cittaM viramati nAdyApi vizayeByaH' (BAminI0 425) na viramati=na vyapavartate
'etAvaduktvA virate mfgendre' (raGu0 251) uktvA virate=upasaMhftavacasi
'upAramata pARqUnAM viratA hi varUTinI' (BA0 droRa0 18430) viratA SrAntA
'pravfttasyAvirAme BavantI SAsitavyA' (BAzye) avirAmo'vicCedaH
'suDAM vinA na prayayurvirAmam' (Bartf0 280) virAmo vyApftivicCedaH pravfttiBaNgaH
'ArAmaH kalpavfkzARAM virAmaH sakalApadAm' (rAmarakzA Slo0 16) virAmo virAmasTAnam
'varRAnAmapi mUrCanAntargataM tAraM virAme mfdum' (mfcCa0 31) virAme'vasAne Aratyavarativirataya uparAma ityamare paryAyaparipAWaH
'idamamaravarAtmajasya GoraM SucicaritaM viniSamya PAlgunasya …tridivagatA viramanti mAnavendrAH' (BA0 vana0 4663) viramanti viSezeRa ramante
'ratyarTino vE danujA gfhezu sahANganABiH suciraM viremuH' (mAtsya0 13922) viremuH=viSezeRa remire
'arDaM cetasi jAnakI viramayati arDaM ca laNkeSvaraH' (hanumannAwake 1014) viramayati vigataratikaM karoti duHKayatItyarTaH
'yoDA vyupAramanyudDAt' (BA0 droRa0 13954) vyupAramat viratA aBavan ityarTaH
'vyuparamaM hEke' (ASva0 SrO0 71120) viviDam uparamyoparamya uparamaRaM cAtra vilambanamucyate nAvasAnamiti nArAyaRaH
'indriyARAM vyuparame mano'vyuparataM yadi' (BA0 SAM0 27524) vyuparamo virAmo viratirvizayezvapravfttiH
'AramAcCAvAka' (E0 brA0 630) Arama uparama virama
'AramedA samprEzAt' (ASva0 SrO0 2162) Aramet viramet
'virAmostviti cAramet' (manu0 273) ukto'rTaH
'antarvatnI tvahaM BrAtrA jyezWenAramyatAmiti' (BA0 Adi0 10411) AramyatAm uparamyatAm prAripsyamAnAtkarmaRo vArayAtmAnamiti tAtparyArTaH
'satyaDarmArTavfttezu SOce cEvArametsadA' (manu0 4175) Aramet ratiM kuryAt prItimanuBavet
'tASca samaM yugapadAramat' (kaTA0 4450) AtmAnaM ramayAmAsetyarTaH
'AremuritvA pulinAnyaSaNkam' (Bawwi0 338) AtmAnaM vinodayAmAsurityarTaH
'ArataniHsvanEH' (ki0 56) praSAntagarjitErityAha
'anAramatyagne duHSIrtatano juzasva svAhA' (Apa0 SrO0 641413) anAramati=(rudre) aviramati sati
'cakzuzorevEte AramaRe kurutaH' (Sa0 brA0 42119) Aratyavarativirataya uparAme ityamaraH
'tasmAdenA ArataM SaMset' (SAM0 brA0 154) ArataM tUzRIm
'virAmo'stviti cAramet' (manu0 273) Aramet viramet
'svAtmArAmezu kuSalapraSna eva viqambanam' (brahmavE0 26120) svAtmanyArAmo rati rTezAM te taToktAH
'mA vo dAtrAnmaruto ni rarAma' (f0 75621) he maruto mA vo dAnAd viraMsizma Candasi nipUrvo ramirgatinivfttO dfzwaH tena yuzmAkaM rAternivfttA mA BUmetyuktaM Bavati
'vAstozpate ni ramaya mayyevAstu mayi Srutam' (aTarva0 112) niramaya nirantaraM suKayeti sAyaRaH sTiraya sTApayetyarTastu mama BAti uttaratra vAcaspati rniyacCatu mayyevAstu mayi Srutam iti SravaRAt
'nirfti rniramaRAt' (ni0 273) nivizwAni ramante'syAM BUtAnIti nirftiH pfTivI
'ASrAvayanto ni vize ramaDvam' (aTarva0 5135) niramaDvaM viramata tizWata viSrAmyata
'nyaSvinA hftsu kAmA araMsata' (aTarva0 1425) nyaraMsata nyaviSanta
'nirAmaya jaritaH soma indram' (f0 10421) nirAmaya nirundDi avasTApaya
'mo zu tvA vAGataScanAre asmanni rIraman' (f0 7321) mA nirIraman mA ruDan
'sa yo hAsya dAnajito loko Bavati tasminniramate' (jE0 brA0 146) niramate nitarAM ramate
'indra mA tvA yajamAnAso anye ni rIraman' (aTarva0 20961) asmAkaM yajYe samupasTAnAnmA tvAM ruDannityarTaH vede Ryanto rami rniveSane gatiniroDane bahuSo dfzwaH
'mo zu tvAmatra bahavo hi viprA nirIraman yajamAnAso anye' ( f0 2183) ukto'rTaH sAyaRastu mA tvAM nitarAM ramayantvityAha
'nyetaSaM rIramat sasfmARam' (f0 41714) nirIramat nyarIramat nivAritavAn
'na ganDahariRo damanakakedArikAyAmaBiramati' (vidDa0 3) aBiramate=ratiM laBate nandati damanako vfkzaviSezaH
'vidyAsu vidvAniva so'Bireme' (Bawwi0 19) AScaryaM paripIqito'Biramate paScAtakastfzRayA udito'rTaH
'dfzwirihABiramate hfdayaM ca' (mfcCa0 4)
'AcAntAMScAnujAnIyAdaBi Bo ramyatAmiti' (manu0 3251) aBiramyatAm=viSraByatAm
'yatrABiraMsyamAnA Bavanti' (ASva0 gf0 4616) viSramitukAmA Bavanti
'aBiramyatAmiti vaded brUyuste'BiratA sma ha' (yAjYa0 1152) aBiratAstuzwAH tfptAH
'mA'kalpAM nArImaBiramayet' (gO0 Da0 1829) nAnayA miTunI BavedityarTaH akalpA rogAdinA'svasTA
'manoBirAmAH SfRvantO…zaqjasaMvAdinIH kekAH' (raGu0 139) mano'BirAmA manoharA manoraYjikAH manojYAH
'anapetakAlamaBirAmakaTAH' (ki0 630) anantarodIrita evArTaH
'rAma ityaBirAmeRa vapuzA tasya coditaH' (raGu0 1067) aBirAmamaBirUpaM ramyam
'rAmABirAma…cittadozaH' (rA0 5118) aBirAmo hfdayahArI
'rAmo hi sarvalokasya hite pratirataH sadA' (rA0 610437) pratirato nirataH saharzaM pravfttaH
'tato ha jAratkArava upararAma' (bf0 u0 3213) upararAma virarAma vacanAditi SezaH
'upAtra Kalu ramata' (Sa0 brA0 11413) uparamata tizWata
'uparamanti GozaM GozakftaH' (SAM0 SrO0 1777) uparamanti uparamayanti viramayanti avasAyayanti
'uparamati devadattam' (upAcceti sUtre vfttO) uparamayatItyarTaH antarBAvitaRyarTako ramiH sakarmakaH
'upara upalo meGo Bavati uparamantyasminnaBrARi' (ni0 2215) uparamanti avasTitAni Bavanti
'uparatA Apa iti vA' (ni0 2215) ukto'rTaH
'yudDAdupAraman' (BA0 droRa0 3633) rAtriH kasmAt
'uparamayatItarARi DruvI karoti' (ni0 218) nigadavyAKyAtam
'uttarARi havIMzi SrapyamARAnyuparamati' (Sa0 brA0 2212) uparamati pratIkzate
'yA kriyAM kartA prADAnyenAnuparamankaroti tannityam' (pA0 814 sUtre vfttO) anuparaman vicCedamakurvan
'tvAM tu kftvoparato manye rUpakartA sa viSvasfk' (rA0 52013) uparato virataH sfzwivyApArAditi SezaH viSvasfw iti tu pARinIyAH
'BayAdraRAduparataM maMsyante tvAM mahAraTAH' (gItA 234) uparataM parAvfttam parANmuKam
'uparatAni DanAni' (pA0 1384 sUtre nyAse) uparatAni nazwAni
'cirAduparatA vAsavadattA' (svapna0 4) uparatA mftA
'ahorAtramuparamya prADyayanam' (SAM0 gf0 46) uparamya viSramya vicCedaM kftvA prADyayanamaDyayanaprAramBaH
'yAni cApi tvayA sArDaM vanezu ca suganDizu vihftAni suKaM kAle tezAmuparamaH kftaH' (rA0 4208).. uparamo virAmo'vasAnam
'tapaso'gryAdupArama' (rA0 gore0 saM0 16711) upArama virama
'dfzwvAntaraM jyotirupArarAma' (ku0 358) upArarAma virarAma samADe rvyutTita ityarTaH
'upAramata tatsEnyaM saraTASvanaradvipam' (BA0 droRa0 14752)
'dAnapravftteranupAratAnAm' (raGu0 163) anuvfttaDanotsargARAm ityarTaH
